note: Permits assignment of rights and delegation of duties absent contrary agreement, subject to material-change-of-risk limits.
Renders certain anti-assignment restrictions on payment rights (accounts) ineffective against a security interest holder.
General rule on assignability of contract rights.
Under UK law, absolute assignments must be in writing, signed under hand, with express written notice given to the debtor.
Governs assignability of contract performance, establishing that obligations cannot be delegated without consent.
